prompt: Send an email to the Royal Agency asking about their place on the South Coast and the cost for my business trip.
completion: Dear Royal agency, I have a friend who recommended me to travel using your agency. She however did not give me much details about your rates to South coast. I am interested to go on a business trip to that place and would like you to tell me more about the place and cost.   Thanks in advance,  Kims

prompt: Write an email to my nephew Tommy asking about the tryout for the hockey team. Encourage him that he will do well in any position.
completion: Tommy, How did the tryouts go for the hockey team today? I heard there were quite a few good players trying out for your position. Are you thinking about  changing positions? What does your coach think about it? Well, i think any position you play, you will be great at. Keep up the good work. Love your uncle Tom.

prompt: Send out a general email to everyone that the human and his pet disc golf tournament is going to be on per the schedule after being canceled the year before.
completion: Hello everyone, Just got word that the human and his pet disc golf tournament will go on as scheduled. We are excited to move forward after having to cancel last year. Distancing and enhanced cleaning will be 2 of the things we enforce, but we look forward to a spirited competition!  Jon

prompt: Email Dan saying I'm going to a show at Universal Studios Hollywood in Hollywood and I was wondering if they could take me today. Explain that my college friend is performing and I will get the refreshments. Request Dan to call before 6 pm to continue this conversation.
completion: Dear Dan, I'm going to attend America's wonderful show at Universal Studios Hollywood in Hollywood today. You can take me to the show if you don't mind, or allow my dad to take me. A college friend is going to perform and she has asked me to cheer her up as she performs on stage. I'm going to purchase the refreshments that will be served at the place. Please make sure to call me before 6 pm so we can continue. Ken.

prompt: Inform the team that they made it to the Olympics. Express my pride and appreciation for all their training and determination. Remind them that everyone will get assigned a personal trainer.
completion: Team, we're going to the Olympics!  This is such an honor, and I am so proud of you all.  Your determination and training got you this far, and will win you the gold medal.  Please keep up on your nutrition and training regimen, and we will be assigning everyone a personal trainer to continue at your homes.  I am so excited to be on this journey with you.  Coach

prompt: Write an email asking if Steven is available for the premiere of Storms on the Horizon. Explain everyone would like to go to the showing at 8 pm on Saturday, February 9th. Note I want to go early to get good seats.
completion: Steven, Are you available to go to the premiere of the movie Storms on the Horizon? We all want to go Saturday, February 9th. The show starts at 8:00 PM. It might be a good idea to get on line early, so we can get good seats, as it is general admission and it is first come, first served.  Just thought I'd let you know.   Karen

prompt: Write an email to Ethan about regretting that I didn't travel much. Encourage Ethan to travel if he can afford it because new places and people are beneficial.
completion: Ethan, I've always regretted not having traveled. I say, if you have the chance to travel and you can afford it, you should definitely go. It doesn't even matter where you travel! I think seeing a new place and meeting new people and experiencing new things is a really beneficial thing.

prompt: Send an email to Cindy asking for book recommendations. Explain I'm into sci-fi right now. I would love to have some recommendations.
completion: Hi Cindy! Hey, do you have any recommendations for books to read? I've been on a sci-fi kick lately; been going back and reading some of the Kurt Vonnegut books that I didn't read as a teenager, but I know you're a sci-fi fan too, and I thought you might have some other recommendations, and I know you have good taste. Looking forward to hearing from you! :-)  -JP

prompt: Email asking if they want to go to Florida or Idaho. Point out that they wanted to visit family but Florida is warmer, although the beaches are closed at the moment. Tell them I will talk to them over dinner.
completion: Are we going to Florida or Idaho this year? We talked about visiting your family a lot this past year, but I also know you would like to go somewhere a lot warmer. I think the beaches are currently shut down with everything going on though. I guess we can talk about it over dinner.  Love you, Carol

prompt: Write an email to the boys saying they need to defeat Arsenal FC. Explain that they will underestimate us. Wish for a victory.
completion: Hi boys, we need to defeat Arsenal FC in order to progress to the next stage. They have already underestimated us and that will be our secret weapon. They won't see their defeat coming. We need all hands on deck in order to grant us this victory. History will be made. - Arteta Fry

prompt: Inform Mary I want to leave by 7pm to Sean Paul's concert that starts at 8pm. Ask if that works for her.
completion: Hey Mary,  The concert starts at 8 PM but we'd like to leave our house by 7 PM. Does that work for you? We don't want to miss any part of the opening act before Sean Paul comes on. The opener is supposed to be great as well. Looking forward to a fun night.  Best,  Adelaide

prompt: Introduce myself as Dr. Francois Riversome from the University of Delaware Admissions Division to Billy and explain he won the Drama and Theater scholarship. End it with the hopes they will enroll in the school.
completion: Hi Billy, My name is Dr. Francois Riversome from the University of Delaware Admissions Division and I wanted to congratulate you on winning the Drama and Theater scholarship. We hope that you accept this scholarship and enroll in our school as soon as possible and can't wait to meet you Best Regards

prompt: Send an email explaining how I found a nearby place called Mahon Cabins. Note that it would be better than the hotel options that are near the activities.
completion: I decided to search the internet and came up to this place called Mahon Cabins. It looks nice and is very close to where we would be. I mean it's a lot better than the bad hotels near all the activities and I don't think you want to travel by walking so much before we even get to where we need to get

prompt: Write an email explaining how grateful I am for the invitation and how their house made me feel welcomed and warm. Continue with how I worked hard so that Steve could win the game but ended up losing.
completion: Dear Steve,  Having been to the house opening party you had invited us earlier today I fell refreshed. I have not had a bonding party for long. All of the comic stories and dancing as we warmed your house. It was amazing to enjoy the delicacies you had made for us. Everything was perfect!  I've been working so hard in the stadium with you, just to make sure you win this game. Sadly, today you have lost. You should not worry about that, though, because I'm going to put more time into training so that next week you can shine in the next match.  Vince.

prompt: Write an email about seeing a little person playing Porgy at a local production of Porgy and Bess and the girl playing Bess was 2 feet taller. Note that the person playing Porgy was a great singer.
completion: Monty,   You're not going to believe what I saw. I saw a little person playing Porgy in a local production of Porgy & Bess. it was the weirdest thing ever. The girl playing Bess had to be at least 2 feet taller. He could sing though! Wow. I never expected that! Go see it!  Ben

prompt: Let Eric know I like his idea to take a train to California. Let him know the round trip is $100 and ask about accommodations and the number of stops.
completion: Eric,  I love your idea of taking a train cross country to California to check out scenery that we wouldn't get to see on a flight. And at $100 round trip, it's so affordable! Do you have any information on accommodations on the train? How frequent are train stops? I'd love any more info you might have!  Thanks! Turley

prompt: Let the coach know Kelly sprained her ankle and that the doctor told them to stay off her feet for 2 weeks.
completion: Dear Coach,  As you know, Kelly sprained her ankle at the last practice.  I wanted to let you know that we went to the doctor yesterday for a check-in and the doctor says that Kelly needs to stay off her feet for at least another two weeks.  Thank you, Nancy

prompt: Send an email to Bill informing him the matches will be postponed for 2 weeks due to a player getting Corona Virus. Tell him to stay indoors for those 2 weeks and train online.
completion: Dear Bill,  It is unfortunate that am announcing that all our matches for the next two weeks have been postponed. This follow an unfortunate incident of Corona Virus in one of players. In the mean time you are supposed to stay indoors for two weeks as we do the training in our homes online.  Levie.

prompt: Ask Samir about how to get virtual seats to the basketball game
completion: Hi Samir, Did you get virtual seats for the upcoming Lakers game?  I am curious about the process of applying and would like to hear if you were successful or not.  I know that many of the 'seats' are taken by people adjacent to the players and I bet that there are other people that are at the front of the line.  But, please tell me about your experience.  It would be very valuable to me.  Stay safe, RGM

prompt: Invite Connor to join the fourteenth annual Shriner's Club Jamboree. Details:  formal dress, catered, 9pm performances, fundraiser for Food Bank of Western New York
completion: Connor,  We'd love for you to join us at the fourteenth annual Shriner's Club Jamboree. The event will be catered and performances will begin at 9:00PM sharp. Please bring a guest. Dress will be formal. During and after the event we'll be raising money for the Food Bank of Western New York.  Sincerely, Ron K.

prompt: Write an email from Uncle Henrick to Henry, asking to see the Pokemon movie and play Pacman at the arcade.
completion: Hey Henry, We should definitely go to the Pokemon movie tomorrow. Maybe afterwards we can go play some games too at the local arcade? I heard they have a new Pacman machine that is completely unbeatable, id love to try it out! Greetings uncle Henrick

prompt: Send an email saying Joe's gaming console is broken and asking to go shopping for a computer
completion: Joe's broken his PS4 again. We're planning on going shopping for a computer for him instead of a console (Computers are much more sturdier and overall just better), and Joe thinks that a computer would be better too. Do you want to come shopping with us? Looking forward to your response! -Courtney

prompt: Send an email to Jack informing due to the federation referendum, the football tournament won't be taking place in Detroit instead of the usual place. It will be happening Friday. Tell him to notify everyone.
completion: Jack,I hope that you do well. The football tournament will not take place as expected, following the ongoing federation referendum. It was relocated to launch at the Detroit grounds next Friday. Inform all the participants, please, and continue to train harder. We expect your boys to win. Gerry.

prompt: Write an email to Kaylee asking a few questions about the cricket game at the Arema Theater next week. Ask if it is 18 or older and if Magda can go.
completion: Dear Kaylee, I wanted to ask you about the cricket game that will be presented at the Arema Theater next week. Is it 18+? Or can Magda go? You know people at the theater do not like children at all, so you know what I mean with all of this.  See you, Elena

prompt: Email everyone informing everyone will be following Bloody Angus Band's North American tour from May to November, starting in Chicago on the second at 8 pm.
completion: Hey guys,   I am sending this circular e-mail to everyone. We are planning to follow Bloody Angus band on their North American tour from May till November. The first concert is on May 2 in Chicago starting at 8 pm. We want you all to meet us there. Some of you might even join us on our little adventure.  Love you all,   Zane

prompt: Email marathoners with the following updates: - Olympics will be on September 19th. - Booking and travel arrangements will be through the agency. - Drug tests will be done the week before.
completion: Hi Marathoners, This is to inform you that this year's Olympics will be commencing from the 19th of September. Hope you're all practicing hard and keeping fit for the marathon. Hotel bookings and travel arrangements will be organised by the agency and the drug tests will be done a week earlier. May the best marathoner win! See you soon, The Marathon's Committee.

prompt: Email the ballpark asking to keep down the noise because of my children. Share my concerns about a baseball that flew into my backyard.
completion: Hi, my name is Tammy, and I live behind your ball park. I would like to express concern about the amount of noise coming from your facility late at night. I have two small children and their bedrooms face the park. It is difficult to get them to sleep with all the noise. Could you please keep it down?  Also, the other week, a baseball flew into our yard and almost hit our chickens. This is obviously a safety hazard that needs attention.   Please give me a call or come over to discuss this.   Thank you,  Karen McPhee (444)123-2223

prompt: Send an email to passengers of updated travel requirements, including taking temperatures before boarding and sanitization methods.
completion: To our esteemed passengers, Duckland Private Planes has adapted its travel requirements according to U.S. law. All passengers will have their temperature checked before boarding, and proper sanitizing methods will be used to disinfect the plane before each flight. Thank you for understanding.

prompt: Ask Maria to come to the gym with me because I am nervous. Suggest Planet Fitness.
completion: Hey Maria, I'm just writing to ask you if you would like to join me at the gym this Friday. I have never been before and I'm just a little bit worried. There's a new one called Planet Fitness in our city. I heard it has very modern facilities. Call me later, Evan

prompt: Ask the coach to speak with me in person about the Sunday training sessions since I can't make them.
completion: Dear coach,  I wanted to talk to you in person but I could not find you in the office this morning. My son, Dan, is concerned about an announcement you made this morning. So I wanted to double check with you, is it true that the training sessions will be on Sundays? We worry because we are not able to attend on weekends. Best Beatriz

prompt: Email Anne informing the Chelsea Football Club Fans' request for Jerseys. Ask her to get their sizes and numbers/names for the back.
completion: Dear Anne, We have orders from the Chelsea Football Club Fans requesting Jerseys for the UEFA Champions League Final this coming Month.So we need to measure their sizes,each ones recommended numbers and names at the back of their jersey.kindly contact them in regards to this agenda. Sammy.

prompt: Email Mr. Ehrmehntraut requesting taking his son off the team because of his behavior, explaining it will make him a better player.
completion: Dear Mr. Ehrmehntraut, I am sorry to hear that. Your soon might become a better football player after all of this has happened. Please consider taking him out of the team, as we cannot become responsible for such anti sportsman acts.  Cheers, Coach Antonio

prompt: Inform Trish that I finally joined a bowling league, and the team name is Bowling for Soup. Invite her to join and that the first practice is next Thursday.
completion: Trish -  OK, I did something crazy today. You know how we've been talking about joining a bowling league forever? Well, I finally did it. Our team name is Bowling for Soup. If you are interested in joining we have our first practice next Thursday evening, and I think we have room for one more person. Would you like to join?  Bye!  Kara

prompt: Let Susan know I am driving to Orlando for the tournament. Inform that it will take 2 days and that I have a room at a nearby hotel.
completion: Susan,  We are planning to drive to Orlando for the tournament. It should only take two days ans that's with a stop in between. I already have the hotel reserved and it is only half a mile from the convention center. We are planning on bringing our own food also. Let me know what time to pick you up. Christy

prompt: Invite John and his family to my son Christopher's 12th birthday. Let him know it is Feb. 12 at 8 pm, and the venue is The Regenta.
completion: Hey John ,  I hereby write this email to request you to join us as we celebrate the birthday of our son Christopher as he turns 12 years old .The birthday party will take place on12 Feb at 8 pm and the venue is The Regenta .We are glad to invite you and your family to share this joyous moment with us . There will be fun games ,and much more . See you soon at the specified date above . THANKS Alex

prompt: Write to Beth asking about borrowing hurdles next week. Explain I'm having trouble and I want to practice.
completion: Hey Beth,  Do you think I could borrow your hurdles next week? I've been having some trouble with the jumps lately, and I never get the chance to really practice when the whole team is there. I want to get it down before our next meet. Let me know if I can.  Thanks, Amanda

prompt: Inform Jason that the Pana Beach resort is open. Invite him to experience the Panamanian cuisine with all the Africana, Spanish, and Native flavors.
completion: Dear Jason, I’m writing to inform you that your reservation at the Panama Beach Resort is still open. Foodie or not you’ll want to experience the uniquely Panamanian cuisine, comprising flavors, dishes and ingredient from Panama’s Africana, Spanish and Native influences. Visit us before the offer expires. Most welcome, Anderson (Manager).

prompt: Email the team, reminding them they are playing the Cardiners tomorrow. They should be dressed in full uniform at 4:30 for preparations.
completion: Dear team:  As I'm sure you all know, the big game with the Cardiners is tomorrow! Please be on the pitch, in full uniform, at 4:30 for preliminary preparations. Be sure to stretch, be properly hydrated, and wear sunscreen. Go Ninjas!  Coach Kayl

prompt: Ask Yuri if she likes country music. Suggest some vinyl records and to come over to listen to them.
completion: Hi Yuri!  Hey, do you like country music? I know a lot of people hate it, but I could actually turn you on to some good stuff. Not all of it is the crap on the radio these days. I have some good old vinyl records that I got from my parents; do you want to come over and listen some time? We could always stop if you hate it, haha. :-) Give me a call!   -JP

prompt: Invite Brad to watch 2020 highlights of Oliver and Colbert. Inform him I have snacks and drinks. Ask to invite Ken too.
completion: Hey Brad, Fiaona said you enjoy good political satire. I am a total fan of Oliver and Colbert. Want to binge on highlights from 2020 tonight? Mom just had groceries delivered so we are good for chips, dip, wings and energy drinks. Maybe could you ask Ken too? Luke

prompt: Tell Maddie I'm now interested in learning how to play Apex and want to learn with her. I don't know if my boyfriend will teach me.
completion: Hey Maddie, Gosh, so I'm watching my boyfriend play his Apex game on his xbox right now. It's actually really entertaining, like I kind of want to play! I don't know if he would teach me how so maybe we could play together? Boys are weird sometimes you know? Later!  Jill

prompt: Ask Buddy about Pat's game. Show an interest in football, inviting him to watch the game next weekend together.
completion: Hey Buddy, How about that Pat's game? I know I've never been a big fan of football, but     the last three minutes of that playoff game were so exciting. Tom Brady who? LOL   Want to watch the game together next weekend? I'll make chicken wings.          Can't beat that offer :)  Love, Mom

prompt: Email everyone that the boxing game is rescheduled to the morning, and there will be a pre-show. Only 10 guests are available.
completion: All, we have to inform you that the boxing game was rescheduled from afternoon to morning. There will be a pre-show as well but that will be only available to 10 guests. Make sure you jump on tickets as fast as possible.  Hopefully we will see you there Kimberly

prompt: Inform Lucy kayaking is a great alternative workout that does the following: - low impact on joints and tissues - high energy - increase cardiovascular fitness - strengthen core arm, back, shoulder, and chest muscles
completion: Dear Lucy,   If you’re looking for an outdoor exercise routine that provides a high energy workout with low impact on your joints and tissues, kayaking is a worthy option. It can increase your cardiovascular fitness and strengthen your core, arm, back, shoulder, and chest muscles.  Kind regards,  Vin(trainer)

prompt: Email everyone that I need the last payments by Thursday. Inform them it is $200 and request they tell me where they want to meet for the tailgate.
completion: Hey guys! So we need the last couple of payments for this upcoming Saturday by Thursday to pay for the game tickets. Remember, it's 200 dollars each of us and you need to let me know where you want to meet up for the tailgate! Hopefully we will all talk soon! Thanks so much!  Renee

prompt: Invite Erica to a one on one PS challenge this weekend. Inform her she could win a new phone and $200.
completion: Dear Erica,   I got to know that you are a very good PS player and i would like to invite you for a one on one challenge this weekend. If you beat me in the game I'll hand over my new phone to you and also add $200 in addition. I hope you'll accept my challenge.  Biden.

prompt: Email everyone that I am in Greece. Describe the amazing scenery. Explain the Mediterranean diet makes me feel healthy.
completion: Hey guys,   I'm in Greece right now!! Oh my god, it's so pretty, you wouldn't believe it. The coast here looks just like in those postcards. And it's so warm and lazy feeling out there. I've had some really good food, though. Feeling really healthy on the Mediterranean diet.   Wish you were here!

prompt: Email Benjamin inquiring about adding two excursions. Also ask if I have any breaks between Full SCUBA and reef snorkle.
completion: Benjamin,  How much will it cost to add two snorkeling excursions to what we have booked already?  Do we have to have any downtime between a full SCUBA dive and just a reef snorkle? I don't think anything we have planned currently will risk the BENDS  Martha

prompt: Ask Sid what everyone likes besides wings to bring to the video game weekend. Ask about sauces. Inform I'm ordering one hundred wings.
completion: Hi Sid, Hey I'm bringing the hot wings for tonight's wings and video games weekend but I'm not sure I remember what everyone likes? What sauces do you think I shold get? I'm ordering one hundred wings so should I get lke ten sauces.  Let me know. Carol

prompt: Tell my brother I have the flu but aren't contagious anymore. Ask if he will bring over a movie tomorrow night and that I will get Chinese delivered.
completion: Hi Bro, Hey I'm stuck in bed with the flu. Can you believe it? I was so worried about Covid I forgot to get my annual flu shot, anyway doc says I'm not contagious anymore so wanna bring me a movie tomorrow night? My internet is down,  of all the stupid tihings.  I'll pay to have Chinese delivered. Bob

prompt: Tell Larry video games can be good when it has riddles and puzzles. Let him know he might like them.
completion: Dear Larry,  I wanted to tell you that I think that video games can actually be a good form of entertainment if it requires you to use your mind. There are many video games that require solving riddles or puzzles and I think you would like them if you gave them a try.  Emily.

prompt: Send an email to Jimmy reminiscing about the old days while acknowledging his successful movie. Invite him to showing at my place on the ninth.
completion: Jimmy,  I heard about your movie, and I still can't believe it! I feel like it was just yesterday I was sharing science worksheet answers with you, and now you're a bigtime movie man!  We're going to have a showing on the ninth at my place, and I was wondering if you'd want to be there to watch it with us? Popcorn, beer, a movie, and some good memories. Let me know!  - Jen

prompt: Respond to an interested buyer's email explaining they recently had an infestation, but it has been corrected.  Confirm they still want to rent from me.
completion: Hi,   Thanks for responding to the listing! You should get confirmed for those dates later today.   We just you to know before we confirm that we did have a bug infestation that year. We're fairly certain that it's no longer an issue as we haven't seen any since, but we thought it's best to disclose that.   Please confirm if you still want to rent the space. Thanks

prompt: Thank Wann, for giving me the information. Ask for a business tour and for the departure time.
completion: Dear Wann, Thanks for giving me the information I had earlier asked. I would want you to book me in on three day business tour. Please inform me on the departure time as my schedule is too tight to follow up.   Please consider my humble request,  JayJay

prompt: Let the team know the following: - the movie is on Friday at 2 pm - the company will provide small popcorn and beverage - the move is Avengers Endgame - there will be a group discussion on Monday morning at Coffee talk
completion: Hi Team,   I have purchased the tickets for the movie outing on Friday after lunch. If anyone will not be able to make the showing at 2pm, please email me back and let me know. The company will be providing a small popcorn and beverage of your choice at the theater. As per agreed upon, the movie of choice will be Avengers: Endgame. We will have a group discussion of the film, Monday morning at our coffee talk.   All the best,  Emmalee Branson

prompt: Let Jacques know I participate in softball and basketball in the US. Ask him for information on his school's sports team.
completion: Dear Jacques,  Thanks for your email. I do lots of sports at school in the US. I've been in a softball team and basketball team.  There are many other sports in my school too. Swim team, volleyball team... I would like to hear some sports team information in your school.   Looking forward to your reply, Jack

prompt: Inform Johan that there aren't any top 5 ball control drills. Advise doing something for a couple of hours a day in his spare time.
completion: Hey Johan,  There really isn´t a top 5 of ball control drills. Just do something you think you can do for a couple hours a day without getting bored. That will be the most effective drill. Try to switch it up a bit. Also use cones to dribble. Hope this helps, Carter

prompt: Inform Derek I want the new Playstation 5, but I don't want to go through the hassle of the lines and searching for one.
completion: Derek,  The new Playstation 5 is out and I want to get one. You can play movies and access TV shows with it. But because this is such a hotly sought after item, it will be hard to get one. I heard I would need to stand on line at Best Buy or some other location. I'm not sure I want to do all of that, so I'm thinking it over. I may have to wait till the first wave is over and demand isn't as high.  Laurie

prompt: Ask for the details of Sreya's travel itinerary, including the costs of travel to and from Kochi, hotel reservations, meals and more, and that I want to be on this trip for 7 days.
completion: Dear Sreya,  I would like you to send me details of your travel itinerary and total charges including travel by various means to and from Kochi, hotel reservations, meals etc. I want to be on this pleasure trip just for a period of 7 days. I look forward to hearing from you soon.   Looking forward to our stay,  Maeve

prompt: Let Jan know the kids' soccer game was canceled and that they should have a game at the park for practice.
completion: Hi Jan,   So, as you know the kids soccer game was cancelled. The boys are probably really disappointed. I was thinking we should get together and let them a game a the park. It will get them out and get them some extra practice. If this seems like something you would like to do, just let me know.   Sarah

prompt: Email my brother asking for advice and pickleball rules because I am in a tournament. Specifically, ask about the double-bounce rule.
completion: Hey Bro,  I need some advice. I am supposed to attend a pickleball tournament with my new boyfriend and I am a little unclear, okay alot unclear, on the rules of the game, like what's with the double-bounce? How can a ball be volleyed off a bounce? I thought the volley the ball had to be in the air. Just give me a few poointers to get me through this please! Sis

prompt: Inform everyone that the new PS4 console stores games, apps, screenshots, and videos up to 1TB storage and that it is slimmer and lighter, available in jet black or other colors.
completion: Hey guys, this is what I find interesting with the PS4 console. you can store your games, apps, screenshots, and videos with up to 1TB storage inside the PS4 console, slimmer and lighter than the original PS4 model and available in Jet Black and more colors.  Now you're in the know,  Felix.

prompt: Send out an email explaining that the school needs students to join the hockey team now that there is a new coach. Have those interested sign with their class representative.
completion: Hi ,  I am writing this to inform you that  our hockey team has  been dormant  for a while because we did not have a coach.   Now we have a new coach  and we wish to request all students who woud love to join the team to  send their names to their class  rep.  Regards   Admin

prompt: Ask Robert if he saw the release announcement of the cat video game. Note it may not be worth buying a new console for.
completion: Dear Robert,   Did you see the announcement for the new cat video game coming out in the second quarter of next year? It looks really fun, but I'm not sure if it will be worth buying the new console for. I wish they would make it compatible with the old console as well.   Darren

prompt: Ask if they like rugby and if they are interested in joining a league I am trying to create.
completion: Hey!  Do you like rugby? It is kind of like the Australian version of football, except without pads. Well the reason I ask you is that I am trying to put together a league. It is a little dangerous, but it is very fun! I learned about it during my trip to Australia last summer. Hope to hear from you soon!  Robert

prompt: Ask Julia if she wants Zack's old iPad. Let her know it is 128 GB, 2 years old, and has a charger and keyboard.
completion: Julia,  Zach got a new iPad for Christmas. Do you want his old one? It's 128 GB and only 2 years old. It's still in great shape for watching movies and playing games. I bet you kids would love to have it. I think I still have the charger and a keyboard I can give you, too. Let me know.

prompt: Inform Joe of the following: - Singapore to Hong Kong are valid on February 25th - Changes needs to be made 2 days in advance - Fees will be added to changes made less than 2 days in advance.
completion: Hi Joe,   The tickets for your flight from Singapore to Hong Kong on the 25th of February are still valid. If you need to make any changes, please do them at least 2 days in advance to avoid complications and additional fees. If you have any other questions, please don't hesitate to ask.  Yours truly,   Sarah

prompt: Let Lucy know I want to go with her to a musical since it's been a while. Inform her I prefer a Friday night but Saturdays are okay too.
completion: Lucy,  I would love to go see a musical with you! Should I start looking for a good show to see? I haven't seen a musical in about five years, so I'll go and see anything. I'd like to go on a Friday night ideally, but I can make a Saturday night work too if that's better for you.

prompt: Invite friends to my wedding even though I am already married. Let them know it is small. Ask for confirmation.
completion: Dear friends,  I know this will sound really weird but I am inviting you to my wedding. You know we are officially married but we never had a proper wedding. Not a big event, but still there will be dance, afterwards there will be a traditional game. I am so excited.  So, who is coming? Demet

prompt: Ask Jim if he watched Alex Trebeck's last episode on Jeopardy and explain there was a montage. Share my feelings about it.
completion: Jim,  Did you watch Alex Trebeck's last episode on Jeopardy? It was very sad but they played a nice little montage of some of his best moments on the show at the end of the episode. He is going to be hard (if not impossible) to replace. It's funny how you can get so attached to a game show host! Anyway, let's get lunch soon.  --Mikey

prompt: Share with Allie my favorite event during my visit to New York City. Describe the video game orchestra performance and what I felt.
completion: Dear Allie,  New York City was so much fun! My favorite event, by far, was attending a video game orchestra performance. Getting to hear music from my favorite video games arranged and played by a full orchestra was an incredible experience. I gained a new appreciation for tunes I've loved since I was a kid. If you ever get a chance to go to New York City, I highly recommend attending!  Best, Don

prompt: Ask for king-sized beds in both rooms I booked. Inquire about concierge services and if there is anything I need to pack.
completion: Hello again,  I do have one special request for a king-sized bed in both rooms that we are booking. I have never been to the city so if there is a concierge service available, I would definitely be interested in that. Please let me know if there's anything extra I should pack. Talk to you soon!   Paul

prompt: Share with Dan that me and my son play Uno together via the phone app. See if Dan wants to join in.
completion: Dan, Our son has been playing Uno a lot on his phone. He got me into it too. Since we don't have time lately to get together for family game nights, it might be fun for you to get the app and play with us. I know it's not quite the same but it's still a shared game. Want us to send you a link for it?  Donna

prompt: Let Will know that he can't be substituted for Hans because Hans has more practice. Inform him he can enter the next game against Daschunds.
completion: Dear Will,   Sorry, I can't substitute you in this game. Hans is already ready and has more practice with the team members. I'll try to get you in for next week's game against the Daschunds. Keep practicing, though - you've got a mean left kick going.   Coach

prompt: Ask Steven if he looked at the holiday brochure. Point out that Brazil and Peru are my favorites.
completion: Hey Steven, I’m writing to ask if you managed to take a look at the holiday brochure that I emailed you. They have a lot of destination choices and so many great deals. I’m loving the look of Brazil and Peru. Let me know when you get round to it, Maddy

prompt: Explain to Robert that I was unable to get a PS5. Ask if I can borrow it and in return, I will buy him a few games.
completion: Hey Robert,  So I heard you got your hands on a Playstation 5 already. I stood in line for hours to get one but they ran out before it was my turn. I was so bummed. I know you're probably using it right now, but when you get a little bored do you think I could borrow it? I can buy you a game or two to say thank you.  Sam

prompt: Warn Leah about pirating TV shows and music. Explain that it can result in jail time or be sued.
completion: Hi Leah,  This email is to warn you about pirating TV shows and music. Pirating copyrighted intellectual property can result in jail time if the owner decides to sue. We are gonna let you off with a warning this time. Make sure you do not repeat this offense.  From Pyro Internet Service Provider.

prompt: Write an email to Mack.   Apologize for not wanting NASCAR tickets.  Say that I am only interested in rally racing, because it involves more skill.
completion: Hi, Mack, I am sorry it took so long for me to get back to you.  I am not interested in the NASCAR tickets.  The only motorsports I am interested in is rally racing, because it seems to be the only thing that has any real skill involved.  I can't stand watching people drive in circles! Sorry, Jude

prompt: Let Phil know that the hockey league will start in a few weeks. Ask if he can play goalie.  Also ask if he knows any defense players because Sam and Peter moved away.
completion: Sampson, The hockey league is ready to start practice again in just a few weeks. Are you in for the season? We could use your goalie skills if you have time to play again this year. Most of the team from last year is back, although since Sam and Peter moved away we have to replace some of our best defense players if you know anybody. Best, Phil

prompt: Ask Robert if he has the ability to procure tickets for the Boston Opera Society festival in April.
completion: Dear Robert,  I was wondering if you have any connections regarding tickets to the Boston Opera Society festival in April? It seems absolutely impossible to get tickets, the ones released on their website all went in 15 minutes. I would love to give the tickets to Ma and Pa for their anniversary, so if you could help it would be very helpful.   Lots of love  Thea

prompt: Message my friend Sirius letting him know that I will be in Houston next month for a Beyonce concert and would like to meet up with him and his family.
completion: Hi Sirius, I will be coming to Houston next month for a Beyonce concert.  I'm wondering if I would be able to meet your family in Austin one day that week.  I haven't seen you guys in ages, and it would be good to catch up.  Looking forward to hearing from you, Sandra

prompt: Compose an email to ask Shawna if there will be an easy way to get from the airport to our hotel. Ask about shuttles and public transportation, and let her know that we don't want to rent a car because we will not go far from our hotel.
completion: Hi Shawna! When we arrive in town will there be an easy way to get from the airport to the hotel? I know sometimes shuttles are available. We don't want to rent a car for this trip because we're going to stay fairly close to our hotel. Public transportation is our preference for the time being. Let me know whenever you get a chance. Thanks!

prompt: Tell Nina that Tara is improving her kicking.   Say she has a chance to make the team when school starts.  Mention that she will be following in the footsteps of her soccer prodigy sister.
completion: Hey Nina,   I've been helping Tara with her kicks and she's gotten a lot better! I think she has a chance to make the team when school starts back. Her sister was practically a soccer prodigy, so it only make sense that Tara would follow in her footsteps.   Paddie

prompt: Send out a reminder to Joe's friends about the slumber party next week. Tell them there will be games, movies, and various activities, and we'll use the new 4k flatscreen TV.
completion: Hey guys, this email is to remind you about the sleepover next week. There are gonna be lots of games, moves and other side activities. I have bought a 4k flatscreen TV, especially for this occasion. It is gonna be fun guys, don't forget. It's next week.  From, Joe

prompt: Invite my friend Bruno to my live performance at Wendy restaurant on Thursday at 2 pm for my new song launch.
completion: Dear Bruno,  I will like to invite you to my song launch in Wendy restaurant on Thursday at 2pm. I would wish that you come with a couple of friends. We shall enjoy some drinks and I will also entertain you with a pack of my songs which I will perform live.  Fletcher.

prompt: Address an email to Sir from Jim.  Ask for workout suggestions for while I am out of the station. Say that I don't want to miss a day of honing my skills.
completion: Dear sir,  I am going to be out of station for the next week but I don't want to miss the practice, I will be very thankful to you if you can suggest me some workouts which I can do while I am unable to come to academy. I know it is quite insane but I don't want to miss a single day without honing my skills.  Looking forward for your reply,  Jim

prompt: Compose an email from Kana publishers to request autobiographies from each of the athletes on a team. The autobiographies will be compiled as a dedication to the deceased Mr. N. N. Nambiar.
completion: Dear athlets, Autobiographies are welcomed for the fame of our passed away writer and sportsman Mr. N. N. Nambiar.. He was very much dedicated to both fields.. His wish lately was to collect short autobiographies for our magazines.. We require every athlete to contribute your autobiohraphies to our magazines. Looking forward to reply, Kana publishers

prompt: Tell Jodie that Wheel of Fortune is repetitive while the Price is Right is my favorite show.  Say that the Price is Right is more exciting and has more energy from the audience.
completion: Jodi,  Wheel of Fortune is cool but it's the same game over and over again.  The Price is Right is my favorite game show by far.  There are so many different games and so many people get to play.  It's a much more exciting show and the energy coming from everyone is just palpable.  Leo

prompt: Send a message to my friend Emmanuel to try to lift his spirits after a rough week. See if he would like to go bowling next week and offer to pay.
completion: Hey Emmanuel,  I've heard you're feeling a bit upset about what happened last week, so I want to invite you to do something fun! Wanna go bowling next week? I know how you love it, so I believe that would lift your spirit a bit! If you like the idea, I'll even pay for us both.  Here's for a good match!  Your friend, Mattheus

prompt: Send an invite from Billy Bob to his friends to see who's interested in coming to his casual civilization LAN party.
completion: Hello everyone, I am trying to gauge interest in a civilization LAN party, so if you are into strategy games, then it'd be great if you join. Civilization is a turned base game so you don't have to worry about the game being stressful or anything like real time decision making. We'll just be playing each other and having a good time.  Hope you can come,  Billy Bob

prompt: Let my friends know that they should plan to meet up at Steve's place before the Saturday baseball game. We'll take the minivan, and get there before the game starts at 1:30. Tell them to come with empty stomachs because there will be an awesome tailgate party.
completion: Hey Guys,  For this Saturday's game, let's plan on meeting up at Steve's place since he can use the minivan to get us all over before they throw the first pitch at 1:30. There should be some super sweet tailgating happening as well so come hungry!  See you then! Mark

prompt: Email Dickens thanking them for using our services. Ask them to complete a survey about their stay.
completion: Hi Dickens, Thanks for using Walt Travelers. We really appreciate you choosing Walt Travelers for your travel plans. To help us improve, we'd like to ask you a few questions about your experience so far. It'll only take a few minutes, and your answers will help us make Walt Travel even better for you and other esteemed guests. Thanks, James Arnold The Walt Travel Team

prompt: Email Tobias with the following: - Match is Sunday, March 17, 2055. - He will travel to Australia. - must buy his own ticket - Hope that he wins like last time
completion: Tobias, Your next match will be on Sunday, March the seventeen two thousand and fifty-five. You have to travel to Australia and get your own ticket. Hopefully, you can win your match like you did last time. Cannot wait to see you again  Eric Graff

prompt: Write a welcome email to Anderson - a new Chicago Bulls fan.
completion: Dear Anderson, Welcome to our Chicago Bulls FC. We are pleased to have you on the team. We will be sending you emails regarding the club and keep you updated at all times. Kindly tell us about your expectations on the club and what type information you like us to send you. Thanks for being our fan. Sincerely, Ariana

prompt: Compose an email from coach Chingaquedito to the Principal about cleaning up the field for the hockey team, and express concern for the players.
completion: Dear Principal, As the coach of the hockey team, I feel the need to inform you about the severity of the situation. The field is a mess, we cannot even play properly without somebody injuring themselves. What do you say, will you help us?  Coach  Chingaquedito

prompt: Let Tanner know that I ordered tickets for the concert next month and got good seats on the 100 level. Also ask him if he wants to spend the night and play video games beforehand.
completion: Tanner, I ordered our tickets for the concert coming next month like you asked. I was able to get us two seats on the 100 level fairly close to the stage so we will have good seats and be able to see really great. Do you just want to spend the night on Friday and then we can play video games and stuff before it starts? Let me know what you think - Ed

prompt: Send fans a weekly Zyco Sports newsletter including: - Peter Norman was transferred from Winchester to Bans FC for $5 million. -Coach Zimmer was fired from Kombat FC for terrible performance.
completion: Hey fan, Here is your weekly newsletter. Peter Norman (The Wichester player) has been transferred to Bans FC for $5 Million. Bans FC sees great potential in the young man and would like to take his talents to the next level.  Coach Zimmer of Kombat FC has also been fired for his abysmal perfomance.  Zyco Sports.

prompt: Contact Playstation 5 renter that the game console was due yesterday and will accrue a late fee of $50 per day.
completion: To whom it may concern,  We are emailing you because our files tell us you have not yet returned the Playstation 5 you rented. It was due back yesterday. We would like to remind you that there is a $50 per day late fee if the item is not returned on time. We would advise you to return the game console immediately.  Sincerely,  HB Gamez

prompt: Ask Connie out on a date at the farmer's market this Wednesday afternoon. Let her know that the booths open at 3 pm and Kyle's jazz band plays at 7:00.
completion: Connie, want to go to the Farmer's Market with me this Wednesday afternoon? They open the booths at 3 p.m. and Kyle's jazz band is playing at 7.  I know you've been stressed at work and I could really use a funnel cake! Let's make a night of it. What do you think?

prompt: Message Chad about he about my positive results from his fitness program. Ask him if he thinks I'm ready for the advanced program.
completion: Hey Chad, I have been following your routine like you asked me to. And the results are amazing. I feel much fitter and stronger now! Maybe we can move on from the beginner schedule to something more advanced? I think I am ready. What do you think? - Hank
